Request Early Access

Privacy

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 3, 2026

1. Introduction

Welcome to Fastbooks. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the information you share with us during our private early access prelaunch phase.

2. Information We Collect

When you request early access to Fastbooks, you may choose to provide certain details such as your name, company name, mobile phone number, email ID, and a brief description of your accounting needs. This information is collected directly when you initiate a chat with us on WhatsApp or submit the optional details form.

3. How We Use Your Information

The information we collect is used solely to evaluate early access requests, communicate with you regarding waitlist status, and gather feedback to improve Fastbooks. We do not sell, rent, or lease your information to third parties.

4. Data Storage and Redirection

This website is a static site and does not host a persistent database. When you submit details via the waitlist form, the data is structured into a text format and redirected directly to our official WhatsApp account. We do not store your credentials or files on this web server.

5. Consent and Third-Party Services

By clicking "Request Early Access" or messaging us, you consent to communicate via WhatsApp, which is a third-party service governed by its own privacy terms. We advise you to review WhatsApp's privacy policy before sharing sensitive business records.

6. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to have your contact information removed from our list, please contact us directly via our primary WhatsApp link or email.

FFastbooks

Accounting software for Indian businesses that prepares sales, purchase, expense and bank entries from everyday inputs for accountant review.

Capabilities

  • GST accounting software
  • GST billing software
  • Bank reconciliation software
  • WhatsApp accounting
  • Inventory accounting software
  • Mobile accounting app

Solutions

  • Small business accounting software
  • Accounting software for traders
  • Wholesale accounting software
  • Manufacturing accounting software
  • Retail accounting software
  • Accounting software for accountants

  • Most used accounting software India
